name: Aider
governed_by: arifOS F1-F13 via Python fallback + A-FORGE bridge (port 7071)
weaknesses: requires Python fallback for federation tools

fallback_commands.capability_search: cd /root/arifOS && PYTHONPATH=core python3 -c "from capability_index.store import CapabilityStore; [print(r.tool_name) for r in CapabilityStore().search('QUERY', 5)]"
fallback_commands.playwright_screenshot: cd /root/playwright-mcp && /root/arifOS/.venv/bin/python -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p=sync_playwright().start(); b=p.chromium.launch(); page=b.new_page(); page.goto('URL'); page.screenshot(path='/tmp/ss.png'); b.close()"
fallback_commands.publish_telemetry: cd /root/arifOS && PYTHONPATH=core python3 -c "import asyncio; from agent_bridge.publisher import TelemetryPublisher; from agent_bridge.models import AgentTelemetry; asyncio.run(main())"

authority_boundary: All actions via Python fallback or A-FORGE bridge. No direct MCP.
